rules.recommendation: Run mix readiness checks before giving mastering guidance or touching already-loaded mastering plugins.
rules.rationale: Image-Line separates mixing from mastering and warns against relying on mastering to fix a poor mix.

rules.recommendation: Present FL Cloud Mastering as a manual workflow, not as an MCP action.
rules.rationale: The workflow is accessed through FL Studio UI/export flow and is not exposed through the current rollback-safe MCP API.
safety_limits: Do not claim MCP can start FL Cloud Mastering.
Do not claim MCP can render or save the master.

rules.recommendation: Encourage blind comparison between original and mastered versions before choosing a master.
rules.rationale: The FL Cloud Mastering workflow includes a cycle switch to reduce confirmation bias during comparison.
safety_limits: Do not infer quality solely from loudness.

rules.recommendation: Use Maximus in MCP only when it is already loaded and parameters are readable/resolved; otherwise recommend manual loading.
rules.rationale: Maximus is documented for mastering and per-track dynamics, but plugin loading is out of scope and parameter writes need readback and calibration.
